title: Mexico Says 4 Foreigners Were at Cartel Raid Where 2 C.I.A. Officers Died
summary_full: Mexican officials revealed that four foreigners — not two — were present during a counterdrug operation in northern Mexico where a crash killed two men later identified as C.I.A. officers.
summary_public: Mexican officials revealed that four foreigners — not two — were present during a counterdrug operation in northern Mexico where a crash killed two men later identified as C.I.A. officers.
